label: a voice near the ferry landing
description: The SCR-09 CH 3 'Anyone…?' — real people near the river with needs and no answers. A local signal, clearest in Rivermouth (the start region) and reachable from next door. Goes silent — mid-sentence — once Rivermouth is overrun (REGION_SILENT_AT): the dead-air row stays listed, and the silence is content.

messages.live: Is anyone hearing this? There's a few of us — families, kids — holed up near the old ferry landing. We've got a door that holds but we're low on water. If anyone's out there, if anyone's coming... please. We'll keep this open.
messages.dead: This channel went quiet mid-sentence, some days back — a door that held, a voice that didn't. No one has answered it since.

notes: reach=local, regionId=region.rivermouth (start region ⇒ LIVE in-region from turn 1). A real-person signal; a variably-reliable, resolvable lead out of it is the FR-STY-05 rumor system (deferred).
